ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pumps" (
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pump */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the pump installation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the pump installation */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the pump was installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the pump */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the pump */,
  "max_flow_rate" REAL /* Maximum flow rate of the pump */,
  "max_pressure" REAL /* Maximum pressure of the pump */,
  "power_rating" REAL /* Power rating of the pump */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_interval" INTEGER /* Interval (in days) between maintenance checks */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the pump installation */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the pump installation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solar_arrays" (
  "solar_array_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solar array */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump the solar array is connected to */,
  "panel_type" TEXT /* Type of solar panel used */,
  "wattage" REAL /* Total wattage of the solar array */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the solar array was installed */,
  "number_of_panels" INTEGER /* Number of solar panels in the array */,
  "panel_orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the solar panels (e.g., north, south) */,
  "panel_tilt_angle" REAL /* Tilt angle of the solar panels */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_interval" INTEGER /* Interval (in days) between maintenance checks */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the solar array installation */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the solar array installation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solar_array_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solar_arrays_pump_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motor_performance" (
  "motor_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motor performance reading */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump the motor performance data belongs to */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage of the motor */,
  "amps" REAL /* Current drawn by the motor */,
  "watts" REAL /* Power output of the motor */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the motor */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the motor */,
  "rpm" INTEGER /* RPM of the motor */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the motor performance reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("motor_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motor_performance_pump_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_flow_rates" (
  "water_flow_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water flow rate reading */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump the water flow rate data belongs to */,
  "flow_rate" REAL /* Flow rate of water */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the water */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure of the water */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the water flow rate reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("water_flow_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_flow_rates_pump_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solar_array_performance" (
  "solar_array_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solar array performance reading */,
  "solar_array_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar array the performance data belongs to */,
  "watts" REAL /* Power output of the solar array */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the solar array */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the solar array */,
  "ambient_light_intensity" REAL /* Ambient light intensity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the solar array performance reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solar_array_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solar_array_performance_solar_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("solar_array_id") REFERENCES solar_arrays ("solar_array_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log entry */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump the maintenance log belongs to */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintenance type */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_pump_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_maintenance_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_type_id") REFERENCES maintenance_types ("maintenance_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, technician, maintenance personnel) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Resolution status of the alert (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_alert_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_type_id") REFERENCES alert_types ("alert_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_pump_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pump_status" (
  "pump_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pump status entry */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump the status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the pump (e.g., running, stopped, maintenance) */,
  "last_status_change_date" TEXT /* Date of the last status change */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the pump status entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pump_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "psi_readings" (
  "psi_reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pressure reading */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump the pressure reading belongs to */,
  "psi" REAL /* Pressure reading value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the pressure reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("psi_reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_psi_readings_pump_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tdh_readings" (
  "tdh_reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TDH reading */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump the TDH reading belongs to */,
  "tdh" REAL /* TDH reading value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the TDH reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tdh_reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tdh_readings_pump_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lpm_readings" (
  "lpm_reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LPM reading */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump the LPM reading belongs to */,
  "lpm" REAL /* LPM reading value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the LPM reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lpm_reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lpm_readings_pump_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_efficiency" (
  "system_efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system efficiency reading */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump the system efficiency reading belongs to */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* System efficiency reading value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the system efficiency reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_efficiency_pump_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motor_voltage" (
  "motor_voltage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motor voltage reading */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump the motor voltage reading belongs to */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Motor voltage reading value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the motor voltage reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("motor_voltage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motor_voltage_pump_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motor_amps" (
  "motor_amps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motor amps reading */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump the motor amps reading belongs to */,
  "amps" REAL /* Motor amps reading value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the motor amps reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("motor_amps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motor_amps_pump_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motor_watts" (
  "motor_watts_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motor watts reading */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump the motor watts reading belongs to */,
  "watts" REAL /* Motor watts reading value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the motor watts reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("motor_watts_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motor_watts_pump_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solar_array_watts" (
  "solar_array_watts_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solar array watts reading */,
  "solar_array_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar array the watts reading belongs to */,
  "watts" REAL /* Solar array watts reading value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the solar array watts reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solar_array_watts_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solar_array_watts_solar_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("solar_array_id") REFERENCES solar_arrays ("solar_array_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_types" (
  "maintenance_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the maintenance type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_types" (
  "alert_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the alert type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_type_id")
)
